name: safe-kaggle-mcp
description: Safety-first Kaggle MCP — confirm-gated destructive ops, submission budget, injection-fenced.
long_description: A safety-first Model Context Protocol server connecting Claude to Kaggle (competitions, datasets, kernels, models, discussions). Gates every irreversible action (submit/delete/publish) behind a two-call confirm token, caps submissions per competition, fences all Kaggle-returned text as untrusted content, and keeps credentials out of the model context. 41 tools. Distributed on PyPI as safe-kaggle-mcp and run locally with uvx.

kaggle_username.title: Kaggle Username
kaggle_username.description: Your Kaggle username (legacy scheme; pair with the API key). Optional — read-only tools work without credentials.

kaggle_key.title: Kaggle API Key
kaggle_key.description: The 40-char 'key' from kaggle.json (legacy scheme; pair with the username).

kaggle_api_token.title: Kaggle API Token (KGAT_...)
kaggle_api_token.description: Modern Kaggle token, alternative to username/key.
